notes: "My son, if you receive my words and treasure up my commandments with you, making your ear attentive to wisdom and inclining your heart to understanding;" (verses 1 and 2, RSV).
When wisdom enters your heart Literally, "Because wisdom enters your mind."
To deliver you from evil The word "man," after "evil" is not in the original.
Delight in perversity of the wicked Most modern entertainment offered by the media (including novels) today is based on sex and violence!
Guide Or "familiar one" or "confidant." The person was perhaps her husband.

quotes.text: Pr 3:1-35. The study of truth commended. God must be feared, honored, and trusted, and filial submission, under chastisement, exhibited. The excellence of wisdom urged and illustrated by its place in the divine counsels. Piety enforced by a contrast of the destiny of the righteous and the wicked.
quotes.speaker: Commentary by A. R. FAUSSETT
quotes.source: Commentary Critical and Explanatory on the Whole Bible
quotes.attr: Commentary by A. R. FAUSSETT, Commentary Critical and Explanatory on the Whole Bible, 1871
